markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Auth0's SDR processes and explore potential AI-powered enhancements for sales research and preparation.](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SDRs handle both inbound (QLs) and outbound leads, focusing on enterprise accounts (1,000-5,000 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Current research process is manual and time-consuming, using tools like Gemini, ZoomInfo, and LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [GrowthX has created AI-ready artifacts for Auth0's retail sector, including personas and call prep guides](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Proposed AI solution needs refinement to be more concise and tailored to SDR-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

## Topics

### Current SDR Workflow

  - [SDRs manage inbound (QLs) and outbound leads for enterprise accounts (1,000-5,000 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Daily tasks include reviewing QL reports, account mapping, and coordinating with AEs](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Research involves examining 10Ks, social posts, and using tools like Gemini and ZoomInfo](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Sixth Sense used for buying intent, but considered "funky" and not entirely reliable](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Pain Points and Challenges

  - [Manual research is the most time-consuming and challenging aspect of the SDR role](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Information overload: Wealth of knowledge available, but difficult to navigate and find relevant data](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Need for better automation in gathering and presenting account information](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Lack of efficient signal-based tools for tracking buying intent and account focus](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### GrowthX AI-Powered Solution

  - [Developed custom artifacts for Auth0's retail segment, including persona documents and call prep guides](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Created a comprehensive call brief example for Jersey Mike's, showcasing potential AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Proposed solution includes detailed account information, discovery questions, value props, and objection handling](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Feedback: Information is valuable but needs to be more concise and tailored to SDR-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Improvement Suggestions

  - [Focus on creating email sequences with discovery questions for SDR use](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Develop separate resources for cold calling and account overviews](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Incorporate competitor information and Auth0 customer success stories](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Integrate past interaction data from Salesforce CRM](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Align content with SDR stage criteria (stage one and two goals)](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tiff to connect GrowthX team with experienced Auth0 SDRs for more detailed insights](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Tiff to share findings from upcoming Auth0 offsite regarding H2 priorities](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine proposed solution based on feedback and additional materials](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Continue communication and updates via Slack for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [GrowthX to share a more robust version of the AI solution once materials are received and incorporated](https://fathom.video/share/H9cWwqTPWk17bzx4yBJ4gRzXd8KKZt-r?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
